programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E85 - Bad Mood'. Bingo is playing Bad Mood with Dad, standing on his feet as Dad stomps around the house, controlling everything Bingo does and causing chaos.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E97 - Octopus'. When Chloe tries to teach her dad to improvise and play Bluey's game of Octopus at home, he finds it hard to understand or enjoy, until they both realize they can play it their own way.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E83 - Bin Night'. Bluey, Bingo and Dad always take out the bins. Over a few weeks, Bingo tells Dad about a new kid at kindy who is mean to her and Mum offers some good advice.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Mission: Party Time'. Disability assistance dog Tinks is determined to help her owner Charli feel confident enough to go to a party.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Andy and the Piraputanga'. Andy, Jen and Scout head to the Amazon rainforest on a global adventure to discover how piraputanga fish feed on berries above the water's surface.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E38 - Copycat'. Bluey's having fun copying everything Dad says and does, but the game takes a serious turn when Bluey finds a hurt budgie and they have to make an emergency trip to the vet.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S1/E43'. Supertato is due to receive the Best Hero Award, but Evil Pea decides she should get it. Carrot tells her she needs to defeat herself to win the award.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S8/E1 - Captain Captain - The Musical'. In this episode Captain Captain has just finished writing her musical theatre masterpiece called Captain Captain - The Musical! Written by and starring herself, with Sandy and Seaweed!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - The Claw'. When Bluey and Bingo are unable to grab a prize on a Magic Claw machine, Mum and Dad create their own version at home. But Dad isn't about to make winning easy.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E59 - Favourite Thing'. When Bluey accidentally makes Bingo upset playing a game at dinner, she will do anything to make her happy again - even changing the rules of the game. But nothing seems to work.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E60 - Daddy Dropoff'. Dad refuses to be late dropping off Bluey and Bingo at kindy and school, but the girls make Dad play so many games, they quickly derail his plan.

programme.title: Pop Paper City
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Big Sister Day'. Hooper plans a special surprise party for Phoebe. But can Hooper finish the preparations and give his big sister a party to remember?

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - The Space Ship'. Captain Sinker tells Cook and Line to build a spaceship so that she can travel to the stars.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S6/E6 - King Cook'. Cook claims to be a descendant of royalty and demands to be treated like a king.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E75 - Mum School'. Bluey plays mum to a brood of bouncy balloons, including an irrepressible floater named Greenie. But she soon discovers that mothering is much harder than she imagined.

programme.title: Twirlywoos
programme.desc: 'S1/E57 - More About Stretching'. A man stretches his swimming trunks then places them in his suitcase. The Twirlywoos have a go at stretching them too! On the Boat, The Twirlywoo Screen shows something stretchy.

programme.title: Twirlywoos
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Full'. The Twirlywoos watch a man turn on a tap and fill a glass with water. They find other things around the kitchen to fill up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S1/E45 - Breakfast'. It's breakfast time for the children in Tummy Tales. The Teletubbies wake up and can't decide whether to have tubby custard or tubby toast, so they have both!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E45 - Kids'. A quick trip to the shops proves tricky for Dad, when Bingo and Bluey want to play a game of 'Kids'. Now Bluey is Mum, Bingo's her baby and for Dad however, he is a very naughty boy.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E46 - Chickenrat'. It's bedtime and Bingo can't remember where she left her beloved Floppy. Retracing their steps, Bingo and Bluey lead their Mum through their bizarre day in the hope of tracking her down.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E47 - Neighbours'. Bluey needs her Mum's advice on dealing with a troublesome neighbour, when the serenity of her couch cushion playhouse is threatened by Bingo's own growing stable of animals.

programme.title: Noddy: Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S2/E9'. Young Noddy becomes a detective as he and his friends set out to solve mysteries in Toyland.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - It's time to bake'. Gran Gran and JoJo are excited to bake a batch of Great Gran Gran's signature Saint Lucian banana bread, but there's a problem - they don't know how long to bake it for!

programme.title: The World According To Grandpa
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Series 1, Episode 2'. Stanley asks: 'What happens inside a computer?'.

programme.title: Roots and Fruits
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Live from the Roots & Fruits Theatre, it's the speedy dancing runner beans!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: 'S4/E39 - The Recipe Badge'. The hungry Squirrels turn to Duggee when they aren't sure what to eat. Fortunately, he has his cookbook The Clubhouse Kitchen: Tasty Bites for Hungry Squirrels.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S5/E20 - Pirate Puzzle Map'. Captain Captain discovers an ancient map that will lead her to a bounty new treasure.

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E67 - Two Dogs'. Topsy is feeling much better: she's in the garden with Mummy, who is cleaning out the playhouse.

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E68 - New Glasses'. Topsy walks to school with Mummy to pick Tim up at the end of the school day. She sees all her old friends including her 'best friend forever', Kerry.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Postman Pat and Cowboy Colin'. There's a new 'Cowboy Colin' book, released today! The children of Greendale are excited that their teacher has ordered a copy and is going to read it to them once Pat has delivered it.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Postman Pat and the Big Bob Bell'. Big Bob, the bell from the church tower of Rev Timm's church has been away to get mended. Pat has to deliver it to the church in time for the installation people to pop it in the belltower.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Cheetah Cheater'. Pidsley the cat plays a trick on the flock by disguising himself as a leopard and Shaun concocts a plan to catch it.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Ewe've Been Framed'. When Shaun accidentally breaks the farmer's glasses, he and Bitzer must prevent him from having mishaps around the farm.

programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. The Earth revolves at 1 000 miles an hour. What if it significantly slowed or stopped? With a loss of atmosphere the Earth could no longer support human life.

programme.title: The Story Of Masoud And Saddam
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. We narrate the corruption of the Mojahedin-e-Khalq Organization (MKO) which goes beyond their acts of terrorism in Iran to forming an alliance with Saddam's Baath Party.

programme.title: International Tribunal For Justice
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Dr Young provides a brief history of how and why the State Department put him out of business and into jail and addresses the responsiveness of his natural treatments.

programme.title: God Heals
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Who doesn't need healing? This series explains how every thought, whether good or bad, strives for realization. We learn how to activate the divine, positive self-healing forces in us with the help of Christ.

programme.title: The True School of Life
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - My Thoughts - the Settlers'. By watching ourselves we realize that in all that we do, something is going on continuously: We think and think! Since everything is energy, this includes thoughts as well.

programme.title: Ubongo Kids
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 of 13'. Join the musical adventures of the Ubongo Kids, who use their hearts and brains to solve problems big and small in Kokotoa Village.

programme.title: Akili And Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E19'. A preschool show aimed at teaching kids pre-literacy numeracy and English as a second language and socio-emotional skills critical to early childhood development.

programme.title: NACTV - Choir and Orchestra...
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. The NACTV hour on Cape TV is a selection from traditional church music and large sacred works to secular classical and contemporary music.

programme.title: Christ Embassy Cape Town North
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. The vision of Christ Embassy Cape Town North is to take the divine presence of God to the people and to demonstrate the character of the Holy Spirit.

programme.title: The Best Of Acapella
programme.desc: 'S1/E85'. We bring you the best top 10 of Acappella gospel Music.

programme.title: NACTV Live Divine Service
programme.desc: The NACTV hour on Cape TV is a selection from traditional church music and large sacred works to secular classical and contemporary music.

programme.title: The Faith Show
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Dr RR Soares, founder of the Brazilian Ministry, The International Church of the Grace of God Church, hosts this inspiring daily sermon.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World
programme.desc: Christian viewers are inspired to live their lives according to Christian ideals and continue walking in their faith.

programme.title: Cape Gospel Vibes
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. We showcase gospel music from the community.

programme.title: Masimbonge Clap N Tap Show
programme.desc: This show promotes choirs from all over the world.

programme.title: Rebirth
programme.desc: Psychedelic plants are important in the evolution of humans in joining religion and spirituality, but as humanity threatens to destroy itself and the planet, a message for the human race rises from the depths of the Amazon.

programme.title: Science And Nonduality
programme.desc: We focus on self-awareness, self-realisation and enhance our ability to connect with our spirituality.

programme.title: BK Shivani
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. A globally-renowned spiritual guide and mentor talks about issues that are changing people's lives all over the world by providing deep insight into how and why we think and behave in certain ways.

programme.title: In Good Shape
programme.desc: Fitness, nutrition, medicine - We offer science-based tips for an active and healthy lifestyle.

programme.title: Eco Hour on Cape Town TV
programme.desc: 'S1/E10'. An hour of curated eco content covering themes that support a healthy and sustainable planet, people and communities, such as water, food, energy, biodiversity, habitats, community care, earth protectors, and activism.

programme.title: Scrutinized
programme.desc: Scrutinized was produced in Gaborone early in 2020 at the Botswana Harvard AIDS Partnership (BHP) and portrays the sentiments of six adolescents around HIV/TB.

programme.title: The Womxn's Show
programme.desc: 'S16/E10'. The Womxn's Show unpacks issues around gender justice and women's rights, and focuses on navigating social, government and regulatory systems through a gendered lens.

programme.title: Workers' World Labour Show
programme.desc: 'S24/E12'. Workers World focus on workers issues in the workplace and related labour issues.

programme.title: Al Jazeera International News
programme.desc: We bring you international news and documentaries from over 70 bureaus on six continents.

programme.title: The One Percent

programme.title: Myanmar Undercover
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. The plight of Myanmar's Rohingya Muslim minority has faded from the media spotlight.

programme.title: Quran And Science
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - 1/1'. Explore the relationship between faith and religion in the Muslim world today. Most of the focus on the relationship between Islam and science involves scientific interpretations of the Quran.

programme.desc: 'S4/E7 - Hard Rock Risk'. Tyler leads Parker to a promising hard rock mine. They detonate high explosives to gauge if the rewards of underground mining justify the risks.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: 'S4/E8 - Home Is Where The Yurt Is'. In the Tennessee mountains, the Raneys constructs a massive yurt. They turn a rundown pond into a food source and create a workshop with a propane forge.

programme.desc: 'S10/E11 - Lotus Elise'. Mike is after a Lotus Elise, but he soon sees it's hard to add value to a car that's already superb. Can Edd help him turn it into a demon on the track to turn a profit?

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.title: Big Little Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. In Canada, a tiny turtle ventures through a forest of giants in search of the wetland, and in South Africa, a bushbaby is drawn towards a world of light in his quest to find a home.

programme.title: The Misadventures of Romesh...
programme.desc: 'The Misadventures of Romesh Ranganathan. S3/E2 - Sierra Leone'. Romesh visits Sierra Leone, a country with a dark past but great hopes for the future.

programme.title: Stephen Fry in Central America
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Mexico'. Stephen Fry explores Mexico in his yellow American school bus. In Mexico city he takes part in a soap opera, while on the Pacific coast he is entranced by the courage of the Acapulco cliff divers.

programme.title: Universe
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Sun: God Star'. Professor Brian Cox journeys across the vastness of time and space.

programme.title: Universe
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Alien Worlds: The Search For Second Earth'. Professor Brian Cox journeys across the vastness of time and space.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Guam'. Martin travels to Guam to see the effect of invasive species on remote islands.

programme.title: Big Little Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. In Canada, a tiny turtle ventures through a forest of giants in search of the wetland, and in South Africa, a bushbaby is drawn towards a world of light in his quest to find a home.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S8/E7 - Crickhowell, Wales'. Ben meets the Powell family who are living an off-grid existence in a hidden valley in the Black Mountains in Wales. While there he helps plant the biggest new woodland in Wales for a generation.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S8/E8 - Suffolk'. Ben journeys to the Suffolk countryside and a secretive patch of woodland, to spend the week with unique character Will, 50, who could be described as a true British caveman.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S8/E9 - Isle Of Erraid'. Ben travels to a unique, tiny island in the Scottish Hebrides where he meets ex-social care worker Philip, who has embraced a new way of life in this small, alternative community.

programme.title: Exploring India with Bettany Hughes
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The South'. Bettany enjoys the breath-taking journey through the Tamil Nadu hills, between Mettupalayam and Udhagamandalam (Ooty).

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Guam'. Martin travels to Guam to see the effect of invasive species on remote islands.

programme.title: New Zealand: Earth's Mythical Islands
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - New Arrivals'. New Zealand was one of the last land masses to be found and settled by people. Lush and fertile, almost everything brought here flourishes, often with surprising consequences.

programme.title: Dinosaurs: The Final Day with...
programme.desc: 'Dinosaurs: The Final Day with David Attenborough'. David Attenborough brings to life, in unprecedented detail, the last days of the dinosaurs.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E11 - Supertanker Europe'. In this episode, the world's biggest oil tanker - the mighty Supertanker Europe of the record breaking TI Class of ship.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E12 - Beijing Daxing Airport'. In this episode, engineers in China are building a new airport that should become the biggest airport on the planet - and they're doing it at an incredible pace.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E13 - 111 W57th Street'. In this episode, the skinniest skyscraper on earth is being built in New York - can engineers find a way to build this ultra-tall slender building?

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Building for God reached a high point in the Middle Ages when a new engineering movement emerged in Europe, using pioneering architecture to create a glimpse of heaven.

programme.title: Big Little Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. In Canada, a tiny turtle ventures through a forest of giants in search of the wetland, and in South Africa, a bushbaby is drawn towards a world of light in his quest to find a home.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S6/E3 - Yogurt'. Gregg Wallace visits a factory in rural Somerset that produces one million pots of yogurt every 24 hours.

programme.title: Scottish Islands with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S2/E1'. Travelling to Arran and Holy Isle, Ben Fogle learns how they're a haven for diverse faiths and beliefs, makes Jewish challah bread and visits a Buddhist peace centre.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Two Feet and a Heartbeat'. More stories of the brave and hardy people who live below zero in Northern Canada.

programme.title: Big Little Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. In Canada, a tiny turtle ventures through a forest of giants in search of the wetland, and in South Africa, a bushbaby is drawn towards a world of light in his quest to find a home.

programme.title: The Misadventures of Romesh...
programme.desc: 'The Misadventures of Romesh Ranganathan. S3/E3 - Romania'. Romesh heads off on a journey to Romania.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - The Mystery of King Solomon's Mines'. King Solomon, famed for his wisdom and the Bible's richest ancient ruler. He amassed a fortune without equal in the Old Testament.

programme.title: Scottish Islands with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S2/E1'. Travelling to Arran and Holy Isle, Ben Fogle learns how they're a haven for diverse faiths and beliefs, makes Jewish challah bread and visits a Buddhist peace centre.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S6/E3 - Yogurt'. Gregg Wallace visits a factory in rural Somerset that produces one million pots of yogurt every 24 hours.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S7/E3 - I Doughnut Know What To Think!'. The seven young bakers are challenged to make giant doughnut cakes and are assigned flavours like strawberry and maple. Who will impress the judges?

programme.title: Baker's Dozen
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - All About The Bread'. The bakers decorate beautiful gingerbread houses. Guest judge and focaccia artist Teri Culletto challenges the finalists to make a bread art masterpiece!

programme.title: Alex Vs America: Chefs' Cut
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Chefs' Cut: Alex Vs Pork'. Alex Guarnaschelli and Eric Adjepong watch three pork experts from New York, Washington and Arkansas battle it out to see who can beat an Iron Chef.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S42/E3 - Smokin' Skills'. Four chefs must utilise an ancient cooking technique while making delicious modern dishes. The two chefs left remaining have to use fishy candy in the dessert round.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S26/E8 - Blondes Have More Fun'. Sara Haines tries to keep the winning streak alive with Anne Burrell to try to bring Bobby down. Chefs Jonathan Dearden and Scott Drewno go head-to-head.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S26/E9 - How You Bean'. Damaris Phillips and Sunny Anderson show up to light a torch under Bobby Flay's stove and set his kitchen ablaze. Chefs Brian Lopes and Jesse Wykle face off.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S26/E10 - The Nightmare Before Pastry'. Katie Lee and Zac Young want to scare up a victory. Pastry chefs Michael McGowan and Kareem Queeman have a scream at the spooky star ingredient.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S26/E11 - That's A Lotta Ciabatta'. Chef Scott Conant and TV host Katie Brown bring in two masters of Italian pasta-making to see if Bobby Flay's skills can stand up to the test.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S26/E12 - Who's The Boss'. Actor Ben Rappaport teams up with Amanda Freitag for a behind-the-scenes special. It gets personal when two people who know Bobby very well try to beat their boss!

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S26/E13 - It's All Gravy'. Ego Nwodim joins chef Michael Symon to go for a win in Bobby's kitchen. Rock-star chefs Brandon Baltzley and Bill Crites must think on the fly if they want victory.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S27/E1 - All About That Baste'. Chefs Kevin Grossi and Lindsay Porter compete to impress judges Casey Webb and Damaris Phillips. Who will earn the chance to take on Bobby?

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S27/E2 - Too Fly For Flay'. A husband and wife go head-to-head for the chance to take on Bobby. Chef Sunny Anderson and actress Nicole Ari Parker decide who can cook a winning dish.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S27/E3 - Belly Up!'. Chefs Max Hosey and Ash Fulk are challenged to impress judges Claire Robinson and Scott Conant with a pork belly dish. Who will win and take on Bobby?

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S27/E5 - Ooey-Gooey Goodness'. The gang is showing off the versatility of cheese, starting with a French onion soup burger and baked brie topped with savoury granola and fruit.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S42/E4 - Weird, Wacky, And Wild!'. The chefs are given some of the most bizarre ingredients imaginable. In the first round, they must cook using foot soup and pork uterus.

programme.title: Dinner: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S9/E1 - Ghost Town Gourmet'. Robert Irvine heads to an abandoned mining town in Cerro Gordo, CA. He prepares a meal using the same ingredients and equipment as the miners had in 1865.

programme.title: Dinner: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S9/E2 - Mission In Paradise'. Robert Irvine makes a feast without a kitchen for 30 people in Oahu, Hawaii. He battles the weather and manages an unpredictable underground oven.

programme.title: Dinner: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S9/E3 - Tropic Lightning'. Robert must prepare a 5-star dinner for 60 soldiers. Using only a mobile army field kitchen and meal rations, he has just seven hours to create a high-end dinner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S35/E4 - From Appetizers To Dessert'. Guy Fieri digs into appetisers, dessert and everything in-between. In Wyoming, an old-school cafe is loading up green-chili burritos and homemade pie.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S35/E5 - Getting' Funky In Flavortown'. Guy Fieri grabs all kinds of flavour, starting in Wyoming, where a restaurant is piling up nachos, and a long-time spot is cooking vegetarian banh mi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S35/E6 - From Italian To Asian'. Guy Fieri dives into Asian flavours alongside a taste of Italy, starting at a Vietnamese spot in Albuquerque, that's serving up a legendary banh mi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S35/E7 - Pickin' Up And Chowin' Down'. Guy Fieri digs into dishes including a barbecue pie at a pizza-bakery in Laramie. Then, a funky Cleveland bar is making monster tots.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S35/E8 - Food Network Super Chefs'. Guy Fieri hits up joints owned by Food Network super chefs, like Maneet Chauhan, who is serving up her creative spin on Indian recipes in Nashville.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S35/E9 - Plating Up Puerto Rico'. Guy Fieri travels with Antonia Lofaso on a culinary journey through Puerto Rico. In Old San Juan, they dig into a chicken-trifongo combo.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S7/E3 - I Doughnut Know What To Think!'. The seven young bakers are challenged to make giant doughnut cakes and are assigned flavours like strawberry and maple. Who will impress the judges?

programme.title: Baker's Dozen
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - All About The Bread'. The bakers decorate beautiful gingerbread houses. Guest judge and focaccia artist Teri Culletto challenges the finalists to make a bread art masterpiece!

programme.title: Bobby Flay's Barbecue Addiction
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Southern Style Barbecue'. Quintessential grill master, Bobby Flay, pulls out all the stops and showcases his expert grilling techniques in surprising new ways.

programme.title: Bobby Flay's Barbecue Addiction
programme.desc: 'S3/E11 - Grills Gone Wild'. Quintessential grill master, Bobby Flay, pulls out all the stops and showcases his expert grilling techniques in surprising new ways.

programme.title: Bobby Flay's Barbecue Addiction
programme.desc: 'S3/E12 - Barbecue Block Party'. Quintessential grill master, Bobby Flay, pulls out all the stops and showcases his expert grilling techniques in surprising new ways.

programme.title: Ranch To Table
programme.desc: 'S4/E1 - After The Rain'. Elizabeth makes French dip sandwiches and magic layer bars to thank the crew for working to get the ranch back into shape during a rainy winter.

programme.title: Ranch To Table
programme.desc: 'S4/E2 - Lunch With Mom'. Elizabeth and her mother get together to enjoy a casual lunch. Today, Elizabeth is making some of her mother's Italian favourites: chicken parm and cannolis.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S3/E11 - BBQ Burger Meltdown'. Burgermaster Michael Symon serves up Beef and Chorizo stuffed burgers with a side of cast iron-charred broccoli salad with creamy dressing.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S3/E12 - Mother's Chops'. Michael Symon honours the women in his life with dishes like grilled lamb chops with rosemary salt and grilled halloumi and watermelon kabobs.

programme.title: 24 In 24: Last Chef Standing
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Shift 8: Elevation'. In the final hours of the competition, the chefs must cook the best dishes of their lives for a chance at $50,000 and an unforgettable trip to Hawaii.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S54/E2 - Casino Royale XL: Battle One'. The chefs are given the risky option to switch out their ingredients. And everyone is shocked when one competitor keeps an extra-strange one.

programme.title: Guilty Pleasures
programme.desc: 'S3/E12 - OMG Food'. Chefs and celebrities confess their gluttonous secrets. Richard Blais gets guilty with arepas in Miami and David Arquette devours some fried chicken parmesan.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives: Triple...
programme.desc: 'Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives: Triple D Nation. S4/E7 - Triple D Nation: Chick'in Out'. In Santa Fe, New Mexico, Guy visits an African joint to taste their extra special oxtail. Then, he has stuffing sandwiches at a cafe in New Jersey.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives: Triple...
programme.desc: 'Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives: Triple D Nation. S4/E8 - Triple D Nation: Crab To Curry'. In Santa Fe, New Mexico, Guy samples a banana curry! Plus, a Las Vegas trio has tripled their real estate thanks to pineapple pizza.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: 'S6/E1 - Judges Takeover Heat No. 1'. Chefs Eric Greenspan, Antonia Lofaso and Aarti Sequeira step away from the judges' table to cook their way to a spot in the tournament finale.

programme.title: Zoe Bakes
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Paris-Brest: Pastry Wheel'. During Minnesota summers, everyone is out riding their bikes, inspiring Zoë to make a delicious raspberry cream-filled pastry known as a Paris-Brest.

programme.title: Zoe Bakes
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Victoria Sponge Cake'. Zoë greets the arrival of summer by baking a traditional English cake filled with strawberry jam, Chantilly cream and even more strawberries on top.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S36/E9 - Quick Cooking For Cowboys'. Ree Drummond rustles up pancakes, meatball subs, fried onions and a cashew pork dinner for the cowboys and cowgirl in her life.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S36/E10 - Spring Supper'. Ree Drummond makes a spectacular and simple spring dinner with garlicky lamb chops, cheesy potatoes, colourful carrots and fruity bars.

programme.title: 24 In 24: Last Chef Standing
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Shift 8: Elevation'. In the final hours of the competition, the chefs must cook the best dishes of their lives for a chance at $50,000 and an unforgettable trip to Hawaii.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S3/E11 - BBQ Burger Meltdown'. Burgermaster Michael Symon serves up Beef and Chorizo stuffed burgers with a side of cast iron-charred broccoli salad with creamy dressing.

programme.title: Gold Divers
programme.desc: 'S5/E21 - Backseat Diver'. The season's nearly over and Zeke's experiment endangers his brother. The High Noon's water heater suffers a lethal malfunction and tempers boil at the Wild Ranger.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - I Can't Drive This '55'. After a re-model back in the '90s, a purple '55 Chevy is in need of an update. With a modified hood and scoop, the crew creates a timeless and classy truck.

programme.title: What Could Possibly Go Wrong?
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Motorcycle Chariots'. The guys turn chariots into speed demons by replacing horses with powerful motorcycles. Kevin and Grant find out what it takes to escape from Alcatraz.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America
programme.desc: 'S2/E20 - Black Sheep Vs South Carolina Part 2'. As the fight between South Carolina and the Black Sheep Mafia rages, Chris Block's team suffers a surprise loss when a racer quits the team.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America
programme.desc: 'S2/E21 - Black Sheep Vs South Carolina Grudge Night'. After quitting team South Carolina, Boogie gets a call from his ex-teammates to settle the score with Chris Block in a grudge race.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: 'S9/E10'. Lou Santiago and Jared Zimmerman showcase special hands-on projects including modifications, upgrades and repairs using high-end performance and aftermarket products.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S11/E6'. How do they hand-roll New York bagels? How do they make a racing car tyre to grip the track at 320 km an hour? And, how do they make lifelike sculptures out of glass?

programme.title: Savage Builds
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Nitro-Explode-aganza'. Adam and a demolition expert stage a series of daring experiments on one of the world's most dangerous and explosive substances: Nitroglycerin.

programme.title: Savage Builds
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - MMMelee'. Using material salvaged from scrap yards, Adam and two colleagues design and build three motorised monsters of destruction, inspired by post-apocalyptic worlds.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S11/E7'. How do they collect the trash in road-free Venice? How do they make Australia's famous sheepskin boots? And, how do they turn pond algae into a health supplement?

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America
programme.desc: 'S2/E22 - NOLA Vs Iowa Part 1'. Kye Kelley and his racers from NOLA hit the streets for their first official matchup against Buster and his team from Iowa.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America
programme.desc: 'S2/E23 - NOLA Vs Iowa Part 2'. Lizzy Musi loads up for the first time as the battle between NOLA and Iowa continues. Lizzy has a lot to prove, but does she have the confidence to win?

programme.title: Savage Builds
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Meteorite Sword'. Adam wants to build his own version of King Arthur's legendary sword - Excalibur. Using the iron found in a meteorite, he attempts to make an indestructible weapon.

programme.title: Savage Builds
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Hollywood's Deadliest Weapon'. Adam teams up with actor Gary Oldman to build one of Hollywood's deadliest weapons: the ZF1 multi-artillery gun from sci-fi film, The Fifth Element.

programme.title: You Have Been Warned
programme.desc: 'S3/E9 - Epic Fails'. Featuring a Canadian with a phobia of lobsters, the world's hardest tongue twister and the Russian paraglider who takes on an eagle and lives to tell the tale.

programme.title: You Have Been Warned
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Urban Legends'. Featuring the world's most dangerous electric bike in the USA, a human powered submarine, a New Zealand based flying hovercraft and a life sized Lego car in Australia.

programme.title: What Could Possibly Go Wrong?
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Rock 'Em Sock 'Em Revenge'. Kevin and Grant build supersized Rock 'Em Sock 'Em Robots, build a motorcycle with one wheel, and what it takes to survive the perfect storm.

programme.title: What Could Possibly Go Wrong?
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Holiday Special'. A balloon-powered sleigh is built to deliver presents, snow is made and covers Kevin's front lawn and holiday decorations are deployed in record time.

programme.title: American Chopper
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Bonkers In Yonkers'. The Teutuls take the restored Buick to Senior's old neighbourhood. Senior and Junior discuss whether building a bike together would damage their relationship.

programme.title: Inside West Coast Customs
programme.desc: 'S6/E8 - Joe Jonas Falcon'. Pop sensation Joe Jonas loves vintage cars. Now, he's brought his '64 Ford Falcon to the team at WCC for a full overhaul with the hopes of bringing it back to life.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: 'S11/E14 - Lincoln Continental'. Mike tracks down a Lincoln Continental, which set new style standards for luxury sedans in the 1960s. But tastes have changed and Edd hatches a refurb plan.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: 'S11/E15 - Archive Show'. Join Mike and Edd as they revisit a variety of cars from the Wheeler Dealer archives, including those old cars that wouldn't go and a few classics that stole the show.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: 'S8/E1 - JAG E-Type'. This classic Jag is one of the best-looking cars in the world and Mike gladly takes a risk on a wreck. But the price of parts is huge - will the project crash and burn?

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: 'S8/E2 - Mini Moke'. Designed as an off-road army car the Mini Moke soon became a civilian cult classic, so this should be a winner. But can the lads agree on anything and get the job done?

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: 'S8/E3 - Range Rover'. Mike buys a bargain Range Rover P38 and Edd sets about mending it. They head to the wilds of Exmoor to give the car a final test drive before searching for a buyer.

programme.title: Shifting Gears With Aaron Kaufman
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Scout 66'. Aaron and his team rush to get the International Scout ready in time for King of the Hammers. But a series of problems, from redoing the fenders to leaks threaten plans.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Demolition Theatre
programme.desc: 'S3/E6'. Christie, Russell, and Mike join Richard on the couch to watch the web's latest videos of astonishing accidents.

programme.title: Secret Space Escapes
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Gasping For Air'. A leak threatens the lives of astronauts upon re-entry. And a mission to the Salyut space station takes a surprise turn when the crew suffers from depressurisation.

programme.title: Man Vs Expert
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Alex attempts to defeat a nine-time Latvian motocross champion that was born to ride. Later, he has high hopes of carving up an expert Lumberjack in a head-to-head competition.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Dungeon Cove
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Pacific Fury'. A savage winter storm swallows Oregon's Dungeness crab grounds, forcing Captains to either run or fight - a decision their families on land must deal with as well.

programme.title: Gold Divers
programme.desc: 'S5/E22 - Lady Luck'. With nine days left, there's risk and reward at Nome. A double sluice and lack of divers sees Emily confront her deepest fear. Shawn Pomrenke finds the ultimate land sale.

programme.title: Gold Divers
programme.desc: 'S5/E23 - Hello Heartache'. With three days left in the season, miners are pushed to the brink, risking sleep, safety, and sanity to dredge maximum gold. Will Shawn's master plan succeed?

programme.title: Dragons: Race To The Edge
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 of 26 - Astrid's Team'. After Dagur attacks Berk, Astrid trauns a crew of back-up Dragon riders to battle back, although no one anticipates how soon the strike will come.

programme.title: Dreamworks The Epic Tales of...
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Captain Underpants And The Frantic Fury Of The Fearsome Furculees'. The boys recruit kids to join the M.I.S.F.A.R.T.S. - the Mega Incredible Search Force Adventure Rescue Team Squad - and bring Mr. Krupp back to school.

programme.title: Dreamworks The Epic Tales of...
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Captain Underpants And The Harmful Horrors Of The Harrowing Hiveschool'. After injecting all the teachers with bee DNA, the Melvins run the new 'hive mind' of the school - until Ms. Ribble accidentally becomes queen bee.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back In Business
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Super Cool Big Kids Inc.'. Convinced old people are the new enemy, Boss Baby uses Tim to create havoc at the senior center, but a war soon begins when the seniors rally against babies.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back In Business
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - P.U.'. Boss Baby must 'de-stink' Simmons after a misfire of Stinkless Serum, and Tim & Danny try to upgrade their small-scale taxi business.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Big Balloons'. Pat delivers helium balloons, but they're let go by mistake and PC Selby floats up in the air with them. Pat has to make a rescue attempt in his helicopter.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - A Bouncy Castle'. Pat delivers a bouncy castle but it inflates inside the post office and Jess gets his claws stuck in the castle and it bursts.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Charlie's Telescope'. Postman Pat has a telescope to deliver to Charlie Pringle, but can he get it there in time for Charlie to see the comet.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Fruit Bats'. Pat has to deliver some sleeping fruit bats, but they are woken up by one of Ted Glen's inventions and fly away.

programme.title: Veggietales: In The City
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Junior Saves The West/The Treasure Hunt'. DreamWorks the 24-hour channel dedicated to kids and family entertainment.

programme.title: Veggietales: In The City
programme.desc: 'S3/E56 - Race Ya!/Larry The Subsitute'. DreamWorks the 24-hour channel dedicated to kids and family entertainment.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - The Case Of The Sleepy Toys'. Everyone in Brickabuild keeps falling asleep and no one can get any building work finished. It's all because the lights keep coming on all night!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - The Case Of The Secret Deliveries'. Someone is giving presents to everyone in Toyland and all the toys want to say thank you but no one knows the identity of the secret gift giver!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - The Case Of The Little Lost Toy'. Smartysaurus is delighted because a little clockwork duck has appeared at the DinoLab. No one knows where she belongs but Noddy knows that her family must be missing her.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - The Case Of Jumpy Revs'. Something very strange is happening in Toyland. Lots of things seem to be jumping in a particular direction for no reason.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Garage'. The Dinotrux builds a garage where the Reptools can be safe, but D-Structs tries to thwart their efforts by pitting them against one another.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Scraptors'. Ty Rux leads the Dinotrux on a nighttime raid to rescue Ton-Ton who's been snatched by a pack of Scraptors and taken to their hive in Scraptor Valley.

programme.title: Where's Wally?
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Costa Rica... IN COLOR'. Wenda, a bird-lover with great knowledge of rare birds, notices that the birds in Costa Rica have lost their color! Waldo and Wenda head to the rainforest to investigate.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Surf 'n' Turf, Hardcase Returns'. The snails' relaxing day at the beach is threatened when the sewer surfing roaches challenge them to a surfing contest. // Hardcase returns and threatens to take revenge

programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Captain Underpants And The Frantic Fury Of The Fearsome Furculees'. The boys recruit kids to join the M.I.S.F.A.R.T.S. - the Mega Incredible Search Force Adventure Rescue Team Squad - and bring Mr. Krupp back to school.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Lucky And The Christmas Spirit'. When a blizzard threatens to derail the town's Christmas celebrations, Lucky and her pals organize a secret 'Santa's elves' gift-giving campaign.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Lucky And The Deadly Blizzard'. Lucky and Maricela join forces when a train carrying flu medicine crashes during a blizzard and they're the only ones healthy enough to help.

programme.title: Trolls: The Beat Goes On!
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Hair-Jitsu, Crushin' It'. Branch learns the importance of patience when Poppy teaches him 'hair-jitsu.' Smidge's crush on a critter-narian leads her to tone down her Smidge-ness.

programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Meet the Peppy, Party Crash Course'. To impress King Peppy during a Swag Stag hunt, Branch invents a tall tale he has to keep up with. DJ Suki takes Poppy's crash course in party hosting.

programme.desc: 'S3/E28 - Got A Bad Temper'. Manipulative schizophrenic Aurlieas skips town after blowing up his friend's house and robbing a taco shop. But will multiple aliases protect him from the law?

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: 'S2/E16 - Writing on the Wall'. In the peaceful town of St. Albans, 32-year-old Stacie is brutally murdered, and her killer leaves a bizarre message at the scene that bamboozles detectives.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain
programme.desc: 'S1/E15'. Follows the interventions of the Security and Customs Services at the borders of Spain who are under the constant threat from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: I Almost Got Away With It
programme.desc: 'S3/E28 - Got A Bad Temper'. Manipulative schizophrenic Aurlieas skips town after blowing up his friend's house and robbing a taco shop. But will multiple aliases protect him from the law?

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt
programme.desc: 'S4/E6 - A $25,000 Performance'. Lee Harris admits he is a small-time con man but insists that doesn't make him a murderer. His son and a friend contact Chris and Fatima to investigate.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt
programme.desc: 'S4/E7 - To Dye For'. Kara Garvin is convicted for the brutal murder of a family in their Ohio trailer. But Kara's mother and sister are convinced she has been framed.

programme.title: Undercover Underage
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Men Grooming Minors'. Roo works to take down a menacing pilot interested in a 15-year-old decoy. And the team struggles to find the identity of another predator.

programme.title: Undercover Underage
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Meeting A Monster'. Roo and Shelby stake out a predator's hotel to take him down. The team is shocked when they learn details of the identity of 'The Gray Man'.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - Death Down on the Farm'. A community's worst fears are realised when the body of 25-year-old Holly Notestine is found deep in a logging forest. But who took her life?

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Bloodland'. On Valentine's Day, 2004, a family vanishes from their home in Vaughan, Mississippi. Michael Hargon, his wife Rebecca and their four-year-old son James Patrick are nowhere to be seen.

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Who killed Cathy?'. When 20-year-old student Cathy Torrez is discovered dead in the trunk of her own car, her family won't rest until her killer is bought to justice.

programme.title: I Almost Got Away With It
programme.desc: 'S3/E29 - Got A Country Legend's Tour Bus'. Christopher is wanted for petty theft and is known for his choice of getaway vehicles. But this time the cops have resolved to arrest him for good.

programme.title: Seduced To Slay
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Murder On My Bingo Card'. When firefighters find a body with stab wounds at a housefire in Alpena, Michigan, it leads police to childhood sweethearts with a fiery murder plot.

programme.title: Seduced To Slay
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Three-Ring Murder'. After a whirlwind romance at college, Michael and Elizabeth marry. But when Michael's body is found on a local golf course, the dark truth emerges.

programme.title: Joe O'reilly: A Faking It Special
programme.desc: Grieving husband or brazen liar? When Joe O'Reilly's wife was murdered, he made a series of incredible TV appeals to find the killer. But it was sham. Experts reveal the lies.

programme.title: Michael Jackson: A Faking It Special
programme.desc: Michael Jackson faced serious allegations for years. Using interview footage and televised statements, experts closely analyse his behaviours.

programme.title: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Behind Closed Doors'. A pair of teenage sweethearts seem to be happily married, with four children and an adventurous life together. But the couple is harbouring a dark secret.

programme.title: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - The House Out On Wade Road'. Byron and Michele Wright's marriage comes to a mysterious end. When Michele's new man arrives on the scene, a shocking truth is unearthed.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: 'S4/E2 - Down The Canal'. The body of Jody Lynn Wolfe washes up along the Dry Creek Canal. Starting with a piece of paper found at the crime scene, police set out to learn about Jody's life.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: 'S4/E3 - Misty River'. A local judge makes a grisly discovery: the body of a young woman, floating in the water. Can police find the person who brought 22-year-old Misty to her watery grave?

programme.title: Real Time Crime
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Warpath'. In New York, a camera catches a murder, and a killer is brought to justice. In Texas, police use surveillance cameras to track down a gunman.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes
programme.desc: 'S6/E7 - For Love Or Money'. In separate calls, officers find three murder victims and another clinging to life. As they investigate these heinous acts, they discover the victims are related.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes
programme.desc: 'S6/E8 - Three Days, Six Murders'. Police respond to six murders in three days. Several witnesses claim to know who is responsible, but a rush to judgment could result in a killer going free.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral
programme.desc: 'S4/E8 - Bad Intentions'. A woman opens fire in a police station. Cops catch a man snooping on his neighbours. And a woman finds an unexpected guest in her child's bed.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral
programme.desc: 'S4/E9 - Catching Crooks'. A man flees his axe-wielding roommate. A group of teens hunt for a couple of package thieves and police receive an assist from an unlikely animal.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Unwanted Intruders'. Armed intruders terrorize a group of teens as their horrified parents watch on a surveillance camera. Fake government workers steal from unsuspecting residents.

programme.title: Her Holiness
programme.desc: Elizabeth frustrates John her husband with her spirituality, this continues and destroys the marriage as John is being pushed to the wall.

programme.title: King Of Solomon
programme.desc: What could be more treacherous than a woman making a king and his son fall in love with her? This could burn the entire kingdom to the ground.

programme.title: Desperate Police Woman
programme.desc: Ejiro is so much in love with her husband and can do anything to make him happy, unfortunately a desperate police woman comes into the picture.

programme.title: Madam Nneka
programme.desc: Madam Nneka and her Keke is the talk of town, she uses her unique relationship skills to win the heart of many.

programme.title: After My Wife
programme.desc: Joe kidnaps his best friend because of money and marries his wife , now his spirit will never let Joe rest.

programme.title: Royal Desire
programme.desc: Richard and Maureen separately fall in love with the queen and the king, but all that is about to change as they both meet themselves in the palace and fall in love immensely.

programme.title: Blackout
programme.desc: Betraying her husband with her boyfriend, Florence's actions lead to his fatal heart attack. Now, left to care for her husband's only daughter, she struggles with guilt.

programme.title: Made For Me
programme.desc: Wilson and his wife finds themselves in a busy war when his wife has no time for their relationship, so his mother in-law devise a means to save her daughter's marriage.

programme.title: The Pendant
programme.desc: Chinenye's spirit husband from Oshimili is hunting her in her marriage and frustrating her husband, to come back to the spirit realm where she belongs. Will it be possible?

programme.title: Last Chance
programme.desc: Ify the orange seller falls in love with Joe, but his aunt will do anything to make sure that they do not end up together as a couple.

programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. The Mischief crew makes progress on the Golf. Izelle encounters a very interesting dish. We travel to Knysna for the 2024 Knysna Motor Show.

programme.title: Binnelanders

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S13/E37 of 260'. Daar wag 'n baie besige dag op Louis. 'n Onverwagse besoeker daag by die plaas op, en Nicolette vra vir Milan 'n paar pertinente vrae.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S13/E38 of 260'. Danny brand vas, en Jazzy is onseker oor haar toekoms. Liam wonder oor Birdy se skielike besluit, en Nicolette besef daar is 'n siekte in Dawid se familie. Rian sien nuwe moontlikhede.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S13/E39 of 260'. At dring aan op die waarheid. Tracy verkeer onder groot druk, en Karen kies Dawid se kant. Louis vra Uys vir 'n belangrike nommer, en Nicolette raak meer en meer agterdogtig.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S13/E40 of 260'. Jazzy se boodskap ontlok gemengde gevoelens by Danny. Tracy besluit om iemand te konfronteer, en Karen kry snuf in die neus oor Liam se planne vir die aand.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S10/E80 of 153'. Die gevaarligte flikker vir Mymoena. Lisa is bekommerd oor haar verhouding met Thys, terwyl Kate en Siya 'n plan maak om vir Angie én Brendan te help.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S10/E81 of 153'. Thys is woedend wanneer hy uitvind Lisa en Aiden neem besigheidsbesluite sonder hom. Elana se cupcakes gee twee Ruiterboschers nuwe hoop, terwyl Mymoena in die versoeking gelei word.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S10/E82 of 153'. Mymoena moet drasties planne maak. Die strop trek al hoe nouer om Aiden, Lisa en Thys.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S10/E83 of 153'. Mymoena wil die regte ding doen, maar gaan sy kan deurdruk? Angie sien uit na haar oogoperasie, terwyl die spanning tussen Lisa en Thys verder opbou.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S10/E84 of 153'. Mymoena is soos 'n benoude kat wat benoude spronge maak. Aiden het groot planne vir hom en Lisa, maar Thys hou niks daarvan nie.

programme.title: Skemergrond
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 of 72'. Die Louws en die Pienaars se lewens is omver gewerp ná 'n insident. Kevin en Gloria groei verder uitmekaar ná die bakleiery. Fabian sweer wraak teen Kevin. Patty en Ruan het 'n oog op mekaar.

programme.title: Skemergrond
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 of 72'. Fabian en sy skurke is steeds op soek na Kevin. Ragel vind per ongeluk Jasmine en Hendrik se geheime briewe. Manny probeer uitvis oor Patty se verlede, maar sy skop daarteen.

programme.title: Skemergrond
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 of 72'. Ruan en Patty leer mekaar beter ken ná 'n rooftog. Die Pienaars is besig om begrafnisreëlings te tref. Sal Gloria betyds wees om Kevin te red? Fabian bevind homself in 'n groot penarie.

programme.title: Skemergrond
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 of 72'. Ruan maak die lewe nóg moeiliker vir Fabian. Gloria sit haar voet neer en dwing respek af. Patty probeer dringend uit Gemoedsrif kom.

programme.title: Gee My Krag
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 of 13'. Ross en Kath van Numbi Valley lewe in absolute harmonie met die natuur. Met kaal hande het hul 'n pragtige huis uit 'n damwal gebou en omtrent al hul kos kom uit hul permakultuur-tuin.

programme.title: Taktiek
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 of 13'. Lisa oorweeg om te rebound met Goose, terwyl Attie en Willy Brown veg om 'n senior dame se hand. Karen soek meer besigheid en moeilikheid vir Taktiek.

programme.title: Ouma Olive
programme.desc: 'n Afgetrede huisvrou en weduwee bevraagteken of sy werklik geleef het wanneer sy 'n aanbod van haar vervreemde seun kry om Suid-Afrika se eerste tagtigjarige komediant te word.

programme.title: Mal Kamper

programme.title: Met 'n Huppel In Die Stap

programme.title: Bravo!

programme.title: Orkney Snork Nie

programme.title: Toorbos
programme.desc: 'n Jong vrou, wat haar hele lewe lank al in die Knysna-woud woon, moet besluit of sy saam met die man op wie sy verlief geraak het dorp toe wil trek.

programme.title: Due Date
programme.desc: A man is forced to take a cross-country road trip with an eccentric character, in order to make it in time for the birth of his first child.

programme.title: Judy
programme.desc: Thirty years after starring in The Wizard of Oz, Judy Garland performs at sold-out shows in London. Renée Zellweger won an Oscar for her role as the iconic actress.

programme.title: A Hollywood Christmas
programme.desc: A successful Christmas movie director begins living her own Christmas movie when a handsome network exec shows up threatening to halt production on her latest movie.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil: Something Old
programme.desc: The first movie in a trilogy about friendship, romance, and a magical veil. Three friends discover an antique wedding veil with a legend that whoever possesses it will find true love.

programme.title: Valley Of The Lanterns
programme.desc: Past choices have consequences in this animation. An old woman who can not let go of the past uses magical lanterns to reverse time, affecting her family.

programme.title: Tad: The Lost Explorer And The...
programme.desc: 'Tad: The Lost Explorer And The Emerald Tablet'. An adventure-filled animation. After Tad accidentally unleashes a curse that endangers his friends, he sets out to reverse it.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: Remember 80s arcade games like Space Invaders? When intergalactic aliens misinterpret them as a declaration of war, Adam Sandler and his friends must step in to save the world.

programme.title: Camp Hideout
programme.desc: A troublesome crime comedy. After a teen steals an important item from two big-city goons, he hides in a church summer camp and must protect his newfound friends.

programme.title: How To Save The Immortal
programme.desc: An epic animated adventure about Russia's fairytale villain. Forced to kidnap a girl, hardened bachelor Koschey embarks on an adventure that makes him a hero he never expected.

programme.title: Puss In Boots: The Last Wish
programme.desc: Antonio Banderas returns as the swashbuckling cat. Puss in Boots is down to the last of his nine lives. So he sets out to restore them by finding the mythical Last Wish.

programme.title: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: Shrek makes a deal with Rumpelstiltskin to get back his ferocious self. But he gets sent to an alternate version of Far Far Away instead.

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: Tom Hanks drives this heartfelt remake of a 2015 Swedish movie. A grumpy widower feels he has nothing to live for, but his neighbours keep interrupting his attempts to end his life.

programme.title: Anyone But You
programme.desc: Sydney Sweeney and Glen Powell star in this steamy romcom. After a great first date, Bea and Ben's attraction turns cold, until they're reunited at a destination wedding.

programme.title: The Fabelmans
programme.desc: Renowned filmmaker Steven Spielberg helms this drama. A young man discovers a shattering family secret and explores how the power of movies helps us see the truth.

programme.title: Expend4bles
programme.desc: In this guns-blazing fourth instalment of the action-packed franchise, Sylvester Stallone and Jason Statham return with new recruits to face off against an arms dealer.

programme.title: The Tank
programme.desc: In this horror film, an ancient, long-dormant creature unearths the buried secrets of the new homeowners' ancestors.

programme.title: When The Bough Breaks
programme.desc: Morris Chestnut stars in this dark thriller. A couple's lives are turned upside down when their surrogate becomes dangerously obsessed with the soon-to-be-father.

programme.title: Paradise City
programme.desc: It's a face-off between movie icons Bruce Willis and John Travolta in this action-packed thriller. A man takes on the Hawaiian crime world to avenge his father's murder.

programme.title: 10,000 BC
programme.desc: A prehistoric tale of adventure. When a young hunter's tribe is raided and his people are taken, he must journey through uncharted territory to rescue them and secure his destiny.
John Cusack stars in this Roland Emmerich-directed cataclysmic film. A man struggles to keep his family alive when a series of global catastrophes threatens to annihilate mankind.

programme.title: Proud Mary
programme.desc: Taraji P. Henson is an unstoppable assassin in this action-packed movie. The life of a successful hitwoman is changed forever when she encounters a young boy during a botched job.

programme.title: The Courier
programme.desc: Oscar nominee Benedict Cumberbatch leads this high-stakes Cold War spy thriller. A British businessman joins forces with a Soviet officer to defuse the Cuban Missile Crisis.

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: Liam Neeson drives this action thriller. A thief looking for a new start must clear his name when rogue FBI agents frame him for crimes he didn't commit after handing himself in.

programme.title: Blue Beetle
programme.desc: A DC superhero action extravaganza. An alien scarab chooses Jaime Reyes to be its symbiotic host, bestowing him with a suit of armour, making him the superhero, the Blue Beetle.

programme.title: Transformers: Rise Of The Beasts
programme.desc: Return to the world of Autobots vs Decepticons in this prequel. During the '90s, a new faction of Transformers, the Maximals, join the Autobots as allies in the battle for Earth.

programme.title: Fast X
programme.desc: The 10th instalment of this acclaimed blockbuster action franchise. Dom and his family confront their most lethal opponent yet - a terrifying threat from the shadows of the past.

programme.title: Little Dixie
programme.desc: A gritty action thriller about a man who brokers a truce between a US governor and a cartel. But when the truce collapses, he does whatever it takes to protect his daughter.

programme.title: Umntwana

programme.desc: When a young man's pregnant girlfriend loses her life in a tragic accident he struggles to accept that his one true love is no more.

programme.desc: A teenager embarks on a quest to find her biological mother after she discovers that she was kidnapped.

programme.title: Surprise!

programme.desc: When a master sangoma is called away and has to leave her five undisciplined initiates unsupervised, hilarious chaos ensues.

programme.title: Full View
programme.desc: Full View makes sense of all the news of the day. The show also features 30 minutes of market sense in-depth.

programme.title: The Late Edition
programme.desc: A 360 view of all the stories that made headlines through packages, features, and interviews. This is also a platform for late-night breaking stories and or any developing news stories through the night.

programme.title: Sports Live
programme.desc: Sports Live will tackle the biggest stories in sport head-on, taking viewers into the heart of the action. It-will analyse the talking points and points of contention. This show will give viewers the inside track on what matters most.

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Morning Live focuses on what South Africans are waking up to on the day. The show carries the Diary for the day, Market Sense, General News, Crime and Courts issues, Political issues, Sports News, Live weather and traffic reports.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: Agenda breaks down the stories of the day, as set in Morning Live, in more detail and giving stories more substance as the story develops. These stories take news agenda forward.

programme.title: The Week Ahead
programme.desc: There's nothing like entering a new week, knowing exactly what to expect on the news front and the world around you. Join us for a snapshot of what's likely to make headlines in the week ahead.

programme.title: SA Today
programme.desc: SA Today is issue-driven and covers regional topical issues in an interview format. Invited guests give more depth on big provincial and regional stories that can be an issue of national importance. It also includes general news.

programme.title: Full View
programme.desc: Full View makes sense of all the news of the day. The show also features 30 minutes of market sense in-depth.

programme.title: It's Topical
programme.desc: Viewers get to air their opinions on the big stories of the day or week. It's Topical gives you a sense of the nation's mood. Digital, pacy, interactive and engaging journalism brought to the TV screen.

programme.title: Democracy 30
programme.desc: An SABC News and Current Affairs programme that truthfully and impartially tells the South African story of the past 30 years, reflecting the good, the bad and the ugly.

programme.title: Stories Untold
programme.desc: We celebrate inspirational stories of ordinary people who overcame the odds and ultimately become agents for social change in healing the nation.

programme.title: Monsters at Work
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Adorable Returns'. Tylor mistakenly allows the banished 'Adorable Snowman' to return to Monsters, Inc. Fearing he'll also be banished, Tylor struggles to get him back before he's discovered.

programme.title: Monsters at Work
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Bad Hair Day'. Abandoning his dream of becoming a Jokester, Tylor sets his sights on becoming the perfect MIFTer.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Elite Force
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - They Grow Up So Fast'. Tasha introduces baby Maya to the team, and Bree learns what it takes to be a babysitter. Chase obsessively designs a device that reverses the aging process.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Elite Force
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - The Rock'. Bree is disappointed by the Elite Force Breakdown, a list ranking the team's members in order of importance. The all-powerful Arcturion space rock from Mighty Med resurfaces.

programme.title: Gabby Duran & The Unsittables
programme.desc: 'S2/E31 - Goat of the Month'. With the goal of getting into the 'GOAT of the Month' magazine, Gabby and Wes decide to perform a duet at an open mic night, but Gabby invites an alien-made problem.

programme.title: Gabby Duran & The Unsittables
programme.desc: 'S2/E32 - Dinas and Dougs'. When Dina introduces Gabby and Olivia to her new boyfriend, Doug, the girls discover that while he may be a prince, he also has an extraterrestrial secret.

programme.title: Bunk'd
programme.desc: 'S3/E58 - Up, Up and Away'. When Emma, Zuri, and Ravi get new jobs, they learn their mom plans to sell the camp. Concerned that Lou will be devastated, they decide to tell her on a hot air balloon ride.

programme.title: Bunk'd
programme.desc: 'S4/E59 - Who Da Boss? Lou Da Boss!'. It's a new summer at Camp Kikiwaka, and with the Ross children leaving the camp to Lou, we meet new camper Gwen and camp counselors Noah and Ava.

programme.title: Bunk'd
programme.desc: 'S4/E60 - Kikiwaka's Got Talent'. Camp Kikiwaka hosts its annual talent show, Finn and Matteo's friendship is tested as they try to figure out an act and Destiny tries to impress Noah with her pageant acts.

programme.title: Bunk'd
programme.desc: 'S4/E61 - Yes, Lies and Tower Escape'. After Gwen accidentally breaks a window, she and Destiny get caught in a web of lies. Noah challenges Ava to be open to more things by saying 'yes' to opportunities.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E68 - Gamer 2.0'. Max gets akumatized by Hawk Moth again. Now Gamer 2.0, he captures all the former akumatized villains.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E69 - Stormy Weather 2'. Chloe picks on Aurore after her grades slip due to her job as a weather girl, allowing Hawk Moth to transform her back into Stormy Weather.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E70 - Ikari Gozen'. Kagami's mother gets akumatized into Ikari Gozen. Armed with her bokken, she wants to punish Kagami for disobeying her, and to lock her up forever in giant armour.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E71 - Timetagger'. Ladybug and Cat Noir confront Timetagger, a super-villain coming from the future to seize their Miraculouses. Paris' fate is in their hands!

programme.title: Star Wars Forces Of Destiny
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Bounty of Trouble'. On a secret mission, Leia and Sabine come under attack by bounty hunter droid IG-88.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Faculty Lounge/Personal Assistant'. Kiff is determined to get inside of the faculty lounge, but once there, can she get out? Kiff tries to fail at being Helen's personal assistant so she can retake her career test.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Trevor's Rockin Halloween Bash'. Kiff is ready to have a spooky Halloween, but Barry gets scared easily. How will these best friends celebrate together?

programme.title: Wandi & Kabz
programme.desc: 'S2/E20 - Yaa Asantewaa'. Wandi and Kabz are learning to fly a drone when the famous Ashanti warrior Yaa Asantewaa appears to them. She tells them all about the significance of the Golden Stool.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S2/E63 - The Summer Belongs to You Part 1'. It's the longest day of the year, and the boys plan to travel round the world on one day. Candace is left in charge. Should she bust the boys or join them?

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S2/E64 - The Summer Belongs to You Part 2'. Candace has joined the boys on their trip round the world, to see Jeremy in Paris and prove to herself that he loves her. Can the boys achieve their goal?

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S2/E65 - Rollercoaster - The Musical'. One of the boys' early adventures, where they built a rollercoaster in the yard and Candace tried to bust them by showing Mum what they'd done, is set to music!

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S4/E84 - Handshaken/Coffee Mates'. After being mocked for his handshake, Cricket trains for a Western-style handshake duel. Gloria combines her work-life and social-life by hiring her friends as employees.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S4/E85 - Iced/ Chipped Off'. Gramma butts heads with Nick when he crashes her special family hockey outing. Chip Whistler recounts what happened to him since 'Chipocalypse Now.'

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S4/E86 - Big City Greens'. Tilly goes down an internet rabbit hole to figure out what happened to her favorite ice cream treat. Cricket tries to teach Gregly how to make friends.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S4/E86 - Big City Greens'. Bill just wants Tilly to come down from a tree. When Remy tells Vasquez he no longer needs his protection, Vasquez speaks with a therapist.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S4/E86 - Big City Greens'. A nature documentary portrays Big City as a wild ecosystem. Avid collector Remy struggles to cope after Cricket finds the rarest of all trading cards.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S4/E89 - Dollar Sense/True Cawing'. To prove to his parents that he is money-wise, Remy starts his own business. Feeling neglected by his family, Bill befriends a murder of crows.

programme.title: Lego Marvel Avengers: Code Red
programme.desc: The Avengers assemble to save New York City, but after an argument between Black Widow and her father Red Guardian about his parenting style, he disappears under mysterious circumstances.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Elite Force
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Holding Out for a Hero'. When Kaz outshines Oliver during superhero training, Oliver resolves to master his new powers. Meanwhile, Bree and Skylar adjust to sisterhood.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Elite Force
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Power Play'. In an effort to win over Skylar, Oliver elicits Chase's help in recovering her powers. Meanwhile, Kaz offers to pet-sit a neighbor's pig, much to Bree's chagrin.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Elite Force
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Need for Speed'. Known as the fastest girl in the world, Bree is offered a sneaker line...until Skylar unveils her own superspeed. Meanwhile, the guys compete to design the best mission suit.

programme.title: Gabby Duran & The Unsittables
programme.desc: 'S2/E33 - Zeke to the Future'. Gabby gets a lesson in history when alien technology delivers a boy from 1821 into modern day Havensburg. Gabby recruits her alien friend Rooney to help get him home.

programme.title: Gabby Duran & The Unsittables
programme.desc: 'S2/E34 - Adventures in Alien House-sitting'. Intergalactic babysitting dynamo, Gabby Duran is back and ready to take her skills to the next level!

programme.title: Bunk'd
programme.desc: 'S3/E58 - Up, Up and Away'. When Emma, Zuri, and Ravi get new jobs, they learn their mom plans to sell the camp. Concerned that Lou will be devastated, they decide to tell her on a hot air balloon ride.

programme.title: Bunk'd
programme.desc: 'S4/E59 - Who Da Boss? Lou Da Boss!'. It's a new summer at Camp Kikiwaka, and with the Ross children leaving the camp to Lou, we meet new camper Gwen and camp counselors Noah and Ava.

programme.title: Bunk'd
programme.desc: 'S4/E60 - Kikiwaka's Got Talent'. Camp Kikiwaka hosts its annual talent show, Finn and Matteo's friendship is tested as they try to figure out an act and Destiny tries to impress Noah with her pageant acts.

programme.title: Bunk'd
programme.desc: 'S4/E61 - Yes, Lies and Tower Escape'. After Gwen accidentally breaks a window, she and Destiny get caught in a web of lies. Noah challenges Ava to be open to more things by saying 'yes' to opportunities.

programme.title: Wandi & Kabz
programme.desc: 'S2/E20 - Yaa Asantewaa'. Wandi and Kabz are learning to fly a drone when the famous Ashanti warrior Yaa Asantewaa appears to them. She tells them all about the significance of the Golden Stool.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S5/E119 - Intuition'. Ladybug has lost the Miracle Box. Monarch has never been so close to victory. But our heroes will prove to be more united than ever. This new trial will mark them for life.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S5/E120 - Protection'. As Marinette and Adrien grow closer, Lila uses her talent for manipulation on Kagami. Will Lila's poisonous lies ruin the friendship between Kagami, Marinette and Adrien?

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S5/E122 - Emotion'. Adrien must attend a dance organized by his father and Mrs. Tsurugi.

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S2/E29 - White Christmess/Perfect Day'. Scratch stresses about getting Molly the perfect gift. Molly asks Scratch to cast a time-loop curse so she can have a perfect day.

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S2/E40 - Jinx vs. The Human World'. Molly and Scratch must find a way to stop Jinx from taking over the human world, but they need Ruben's help.

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S2/E41 - The End'. A flood of lost memories forces Scratch to make big decisions about his afterlife.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E71 - Timetagger'. Ladybug and Cat Noir confront Timetagger, a super-villain coming from the future to seize their Miraculouses. Paris' fate is in their hands!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E72 - Party Crasher'. Because of a misunderstanding, a fan of Adrien's gets akumatized into Party Crasher. Convinced that his star has made a fool of him, he is determined to get revenge.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E73 - The Puppeteer 2'. Ladybug and Cat Noir must face the Puppeteer again at the Musee Grevin! Our heroes will need to put on a show to stop her.

programme.title: Disney Saturdays
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Goin' for Gold!'. It's finally time for the Battle-to-be-Golden Skate Competition, and stakes are high! We-B-Girlz and 2-Cute-4-U come face-to-face in the ultimate skating showdown.

programme.title: Disney Saturdays
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Skates, Lies & Videos'. When Paris, Ari and Simone learn that a music video is being recorded at Saturdays, they decide they have to be in it! But they have to age up to look eighteen.

programme.title: Disney Saturdays
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Comb Back to Me'. London begins his new job as the rink's DJ and starts to embarrass Paris. So Paris hatches a plan to turn London's world upside-down so her world can be right side up again.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Elite Force
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Rise of Five'. After the Mighty Med hospital is destroyed, Kaz, Oliver, and Skylar join forces with Bree and Chase to form a powerful elite force that combines bionic heroes and superheroes.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Elite Force
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Sheep-shifting'. When Oliver skips out on their tradition of pulling Halloween pranks in favor of a date with Skylar, Kaz continues on his own. Perry enlists Bree's protection for the night.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Elite Force
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - The Attack'. Roman and Riker's black swarm returns, so the Elite Force hops into action to protect Centium City. There's more than meets the eye with Chase's new girlfriend Reese.

programme.title: Gabby Duran & The Unsittables
programme.desc: 'S2/E35'. When Grandma Ruth babysits Gabby and Olivia for the weekend, Gabby tries to pep her up with an alien energy drink, but accidentally transforms Grandma into a Gwargwarian warrior.

programme.title: Gabby Duran & The Unsittables
programme.desc: 'S2/E36'. When Gabby pauses her 'Stay Fresh, Refresh Weekend' to babysit Jeremy and his wild bestie, Ziggy, she's quickly overwhelmed by their extreme ruckus.

programme.title: Gabby Duran & The Unsittables
programme.desc: 'S2/E34 - Adventures in Alien House-sitting'. Intergalactic babysitting dynamo, Gabby Duran is back and ready to take her skills to the next level!

programme.desc: Danny Ocean and his eleven accomplices plan to rob three Las Vegas casinos simultaneously.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Sheepsquatch Of Boone County'. The team investigate a bizarre creature called The Sheepsquatch. They build a custom razor wire trap before embarking upon a perilous night hunt.

programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Founding Fathers'. Discovers which of America's founding fathers used sex as an instrument of diplomacy and which one secretly scoffed at the divinity of Jesus.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Surf's Up, Sasquatch'. The team visits Mike Rugg's Bigfoot Discovery Museum. Mike is a one-man town hall and directs the team to recent eyewitnesses and secret hotspots.

programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - South Jersey Sasquatch'. The team visits the Garden State for the first time. After their successful night investigation, they hold a town hall meeting to gather more witnesses.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S11/E11 - Chain Of Fools'. Don investigates an iron link at the centre of a formidable fraud and a plane that launched some of the most incredible journeys into space.

programme.title: UFO Witness

programme.title: UFO Witness

programme.title: UFO Witness
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Grey Alien-Human Hybridization'. A series of cattle mutilations may be linked to a twisted alien experiment. Ben and Melissa head to Colorado to investigate this strange connection.

programme.title: UFO Witness
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Arcturians And Black Triangles'. Alarmingly advanced UFOs may pose a threat to the future of humanity. Ben and Melissa head to Las Vegas to investigate whether these claims are true.

programme.title: UFO Witness
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Pleiadians And Alien Conspiracy'. Ben and Melissa explore a recent trend that has them concerned. Are extra-terrestrials brainwashing their victims in a plot to dominate humanity?

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Experimental Soldiers'. At the height of the Cold War, the USA searches for a way to create a generation of 'Supersoldiers' who use telepathy to win battles.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
